product: Track and navigate notebook runs with the new cell execution minimap
tagline: Use the cell execution minimap to track your notebook’s progress at a glance.
what_it_does: Use the cell execution minimap to track your notebook’s progress at a glance. The minimap appears in the right margin and shows each cell’s execution state (skipped, queued, running, success, or error). Hover to see cell details, or click to jump directly to a cell.
why_it_matters: Python type error highlighting: Type checking can improve code quality, readability, and maintainability in Python and PySpark projects.

capabilities.title: On macOS, hold down the
capabilities.desc: On macOS, hold down the Cmd key and click in each location to add a cursor.

capabilities.title: On Windows, hold down the
capabilities.desc: On Windows, hold down the Ctrl key and click in each location to add a cursor.

capabilities.title: On macOS, press Option and
capabilities.desc: On macOS, press Option and drag to the lower right to capture one or more columns.

capabilities.title: On Windows, press Alt and
capabilities.desc: On Windows, press Alt and drag to the lower right to capture one or more columns.

key_takeaway: Use the cell execution minimap to track your notebook’s progress at a glance.
